structural_claim: Seemingly distinct mathematical domains are unified by deeper structural patterns that transcend traditional boundaries

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Topoi provide a unified foundation for geometry, logic, and set theory, showing that these apparently distinct areas share the same categorical structure

Every elliptic curve over the rationals is modular, establishing a fundamental bridge between algebraic geometry and automorphic forms that reveals the unity of seemingly disparate mathematical structures

The coefficients of the j-function are dimensions of irreducible representations of the Monster group, revealing unexpected connections between modular forms, finite groups, and vertex operator algebras
